title: galium rotundum
intro: Galium rotundum, also known as round-leaved avens, is a perennial herb that belongs to the bedstraw family (Galium spp.). It has been traditionally used for its medicinal properties, particularly in treating urinary tract infections, kidney stones, and inflammation. The health benefits of Galium rotundum include its diuretic and anti-inflammatory properties, which can help to reduce the risk of kidney stones and alleviate symptoms of urinary tract infections. In herbal preparations, Galium rotundum is often used in the form of teas, infusions, or tinctures, and can also be found in combination with other herbs in remedies for urinary health issues.
